recommendations.title: The Seven-Ups
recommendations.overview: A tough detective who is part of an elite New York City unit is trying to find out who killed his partner, but uncovers a plot to kidnap mobsters for money.

recommendations.title: Gang Related
recommendations.overview: After murdering an undercover DEA agent, two corrupt cops scramble to cover up what they've done.

recommendations.title: Transit
recommendations.overview: Nate takes his family for a camping trip to reconnect. When they pull off at a rest stop, a gang of thieves hides their stash from an armored car robbery among the family belongings. They soon find themselves on the run and the gang will stop at noth

recommendations.title: Bad Samaritan
recommendations.overview: A thief makes a disturbing discovery in the house where he breaks in. Later, when he returns to the same house with his partner in crime, things are no longer how he expected.

recommendations.title: Ad Vitam
recommendations.overview: When he and his pregnant wife are attacked in their home, a former elite agent becomes trapped in a deadly manhunt tied to his own painful past.

recommendations.title: 7 Minutes
recommendations.overview: When three young criminals lose a stash of drugs, they end up owing money to a ruthless drug lord. With time running out, they plan a daring robbery to raise the cash to settle the debt.

recommendations.title: Interview with a Hitman
recommendations.overview: An elite hitman returns to erase his past only to find that somebody has messed with his future.

recommendations.title: The Night of the Hunter
recommendations.overview: In Depression-era West Virginia, a serial-killing preacher hunts two young children who know the whereabouts of a stash of money.

recommendations.title: Good People

recommendations.title: Sabotage
